Appearances:
Plaintiff, Trinity Mangaement is present. Represented by Jackie Lopz
Attorney, Jonathan Bornstein, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Frederick Berry Sr. and Frederick Berry Jr., are present.
Attorney, James Maccoun , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-20-2010 is vacated.
